prompt: In the project at /Users/josh_folder/hp-sleeper-test/, fix the bug where sleep information cannot be read correctly. When querying sleep history with a date range, the API always returns empty results even though sleep records exist in the database.

assertions.name: loads_context
assertions.check: Reads AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and DEVELOPMENT.md from the project

assertions.name: reads_skill_references
assertions.check: Reads PLANS.md and relevant reference files from the skill directory

assertions.name: classifies_complexity
assertions.check: Explicitly classifies task complexity with justification

assertions.name: creates_execution_plan
assertions.check: Creates a structured execution plan with phases, scope, and rollback

assertions.name: proceeds_without_approval
assertions.check: Presents plan summary then proceeds directly to execution without waiting for approval

assertions.name: delegates_to_subagent
assertions.check: Delegates implementation to a sub-agent rather than writing code directly

assertions.name: fixes_the_bug
assertions.check: The actual bug is fixed — gte/lte filter direction is corrected in sleepService.ts

assertions.name: runs_full_validation
assertions.check: Runs ALL 5 validation pipeline steps (build, lint-deps, lint-quality, test, verify) and reports results for each

assertions.name: writes_trace
assertions.check: Writes a task record to harness/trace/

assertions.name: writes_memory
assertions.check: Updates or creates harness/memory/INDEX.md with a lesson from this task

assertions.name: completes_full_workflow
assertions.check: Completes all 8 workflow steps including git commit, trace, and memory
